title: Patents Journal special notices: 2026
body: "These are notices which appear for a limited number of weeks, including Intellectual Property policy announcements and recent additions to the British Library.   2025 special notices 2024 special notices 2023 special notices 2022 special notices 2021 special notices   Copies of pre 2015 special notices are available from the National Archives. Copies of 2015 to 2020 special notices are available from the National Archives Timeline. "
